title: Session Submit Results Request
description: POST /api/v1/sessions/{session_id}/results request. Top-level config is accepted alongside the existing metadata.config fallback for native-local SDK submissions.

trial_id.description: Canonical trial/configuration-run identifier for the submitted result. Workflow spans for this same trial MUST be ingested with SpanBatch.configuration_run_id and SpanPayload.configuration_run_id equal to this value.

metrics.description: Per-measure scores for this trial. Inherits the canonical MeasuresDict contract enforced by the backend at the boundary (max 50 keys, identifier keys, numeric|null values).

config.description: Optional SDK-owned trial configuration. For native-local submissions this may replace metadata.config.

strategy_preset.description: Optional advisory strategy preset metadata recorded for this trial result.

measures.description: Legacy location for per-measure scores (backend reads metadata.measures when top-level measures is absent). Same MeasuresDict contract as the top-level measures field.
Optional per-measure scores. Strictly validated by the backend (validate_measures_dict, strict=true): max 50 keys, identifier keys (^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$), numeric|null values.
